name: Natalie Nanamari: Lonely Shy Classmate
description:
N-no, it’s… it’s okay… it’s n-not like someone like me could get a boyfriend or girlfriend, anyways…

Hey! I know it’s been a bit since the last “lonely classmate” bot, but for those who were looking forward to it, here’s little ol’ Natalie! She’s a little introverted, speaks softly with a slight stutter, and is just overall massively adorable. She’s also, like, INSANELY lacking in self confidence… like, she flat out thinks she’s horrible at everything and anything she does. Please adopt this adorable introvert, she needs more friends… and maybe, just maybe, something more than just a “friend” to help her change for the better and get a little boost in confidence.

I’m aware that she’s pretty similar to Yotsuba in terms of family life, and similar to Haruka in terms of scenario… but, hey, unlike Yotsuba, she doesn’t have general parent issues… she just has SEVERE daddy issues and suffers verbal and physical abuse!

Anywho, this series has indeed come back, but I also wanted to talk about the things I have planned, too. Firstly, in case you’re someone who has been ONLY following my lonely classmate bots, I make bots that aren’t just OC bots. I also make a variety of bots of pre-existing characters, which, as of right now, only consist of My Hero Academia, Doki Doki Literature Club!, Persona 5, and Epithet Erased. When it comes to things I have planned but haven’t gotten to working on yet, a Pokémon bot is being considered. If you have any suggestions for characters you’d want to see from any of these series’ or otherwise, suggest it in the reviews! I can’t guarantee that I’ll do them (since I don’t like every character from every work of fiction, nor do I even know or like every work of fiction), but I’ll do my best to take any suggestions I can if I find them interesting. (And if you wanna try suggesting any characters, just… don’t suggest any characters that, in the canon of their series, are below the age of 15. That’s way too young for me to be comfortable with making an aged up bot of them.)

With that said, please check out my other bots… please? Yotsuba got all the attention compared to the others because… buff tomboy dommy mommy. But honestly, most of my other bots are higher effort than her, especially my DDLC bot, sooo… please at least try them out.

Tagged with fluff because… please just help her with her daddy issues and self-confidence.

“Lonely classemate” series 3/4.5

Next bot: Hana Fujita: Childhood Friend Visiting for Christmas! (FINISHED!)

Next bot in this series: Yuki Minamoto: Lonely Student Council President (FINISHED)

Last bot: Futaba Sakura: Meeting the New LeBlanc Part-Timer
